scene_description: A woman stands in a brightly lit, modern apartment and does a quick outfit reveal. She first shows the outfit on a hanger, and then after a jump cut, she is wearing it and strikes a few poses.

subject.lighting: bright, natural daylight from the side

motion_script.action: A person stands facing the camera, holding an outfit on a hanger, smiling and talking.
The person, now wearing the outfit, gestures with open hands and then places them on their waist in a surprised expression.
The person smooths the front of their top while looking down and then back at the camera.
The person turns to their right to show their side profile to the camera.
The person turns back to face the camera, arms slightly outstretched.
The person places their left hand on their hip, posing for the camera.

composition_notes: The shot is static from a fixed camera, likely on a tripod. The composition is centered on the subject. A single jump cut is used for the outfit change transition.

style.color_treatment: natural and bright with warm tones
style.lighting_effects: bright, natural window light from the right side

shot_backgrounds: modern apartment interior with light wood floors, neutral-colored cabinets in the background, and a large arched floor mirror.
